name: Chicken Tequila
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the chicken breasts in the stock until tender. Remove and cube. Set aside, reserving the stock.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan. Add garlic and sauté for about 1 minute.
3. Add tomatoes (breaking them up) and the remaining ingredients to the pan. Stir well.
4. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
5. Return the chicken to the pan and heat until warmed through.
6. Toss with cooked noodles. If the sauce becomes too thick, add more chicken stock as needed.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and garnish with fresh basil or parsley leaves.
